title: Tangy Crispy Kenyan Deodeok Root Skewers
description: A sour and crispy Kenyan dish featuring deodeok root, rest meat, and shojin friendly ingredients, perfect for a crowd pleasing snack

ingredients.name: deodeok root
ingredients.notes: peeled and cut into 1 inch pieces

instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit
In a large bowl, whisk together lemon juice, olive oil, garlic, ginger, salt, and black pepper
Add the deodeok root and rest meat to the bowl and toss to coat
Thread the deodeok root and rest meat onto skewers
Place the skewers on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper
Bake for 20 minutes, flipping halfway through
Increase the oven temperature to 425 degrees Fahrenheit and bake for an additional 5 minutes
Remove the skewers from the oven and let cool for 5 minutes
